# hindclaw_user_channel (Resource)

Maps a channel sender to a Hindclaw user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hindclaw_user_channel" "alice_telegram" {
  user_id          = "alice"
  channel_provider = "telegram"
  sender_id        = "123456789"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_provider` (String) Channel provider (e.g. telegram).
- `sender_id` (String) Sender identifier within the channel.
- `user_id` (String) User identifier.
